title: [FIRRTL] Preserve aggregate of memory data type to make LEC friendly

features.name: memory with packed struct data type
features.description: Code should include a memory declaration with a packed struct data type, where the struct contains multiple fields of different widths
features.snippet: struct packed {logic [7:0] a; logic unused; logic [7:0] b;} Memory[0:7];

features.name: memory with aggregate type vs flat integer
features.description: Code should include two memory declarations where one uses an aggregate packed struct type and the other uses a flat integer type with equivalent total bit width
features.snippet:
struct packed {logic [7:0] a; logic [7:0] b;} agg_mem[0:7];
reg [15:0] flat_mem[0:7];

features.name: packed struct with fields of different widths
features.description: Code should include a packed struct declaration with fields of different widths, useful for representing aggregate data in memory elements
features.snippet: struct packed {logic [7:0] a; logic unused; logic [7:0] b;} data;
